summary: Full e2e testing of HSI Enterprise Portal. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests also passed with all sections rendering correctly. One minor timing issue with back-to-dashboard selector on app pages.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='back-to-dashboard' not found immediately after navigation (timing/load issue). Button does exist in code at line 113 of AppPage.jsx.

issues: Stats cards (Total Users, Admins, Managers, Employees) briefly show 0 on initial render before API data loads - no loading skeleton/spinner shown for stats cards

critical_code_review_comments: server.py has hardcoded fallback credentials (DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET) in code - these should fail fast if env vars missing, not fallback to defaults
Admin panel stats briefly flash 0 - consider adding loading state for stats cards
seed_users() runs on every startup but only inserts if not exists - this is idempotent, which is correct
No brute force lockout mechanism implemented (playbook requirement: lockout after 5 fails)
CORS uses allow_credentials=False with allow_origins=['*'] which is acceptable but httpOnly cookies are not used (JWT in localStorage instead)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all major flows work, minor timing issue on back button)

seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 6 users on startup including admin, employee, manager
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows working: login/register/logout, dashboard sections (9 sections verified), admin panel user management (list, filter by role, role change), employee redirect from /admin, app card navigation to /apps/{id}. Backend uses PostgreSQL + JWT. Dashboard data is MOCKED except leaderboard which queries real DB.
mocked_apis: All /api/dashboard/* endpoints return static mock data EXCEPT /api/dashboard/leaderboard which queries PostgreSQL
